mapper.select:
SELECT POST_ID, TITLE, CONTENTS, REG_ID, REG_DATE, COMMUNITY_ID, HIDDEN_INFO, HIT_COUNT, IS_NOTICE FROM TB_BOARD
AND TITLE LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
AND CONTENTS LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
AND REG_ID LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
ORDER BY POST_ID DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT POST_ID, TITLE, CONTENTS, REG_ID, REG_DATE, COMMUNITY_ID, HIDDEN_INFO, HIT_COUNT, IS_NOTICE FROM TB_BOARD
AND TITLE LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
AND CONTENTS LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
AND REG_ID LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
ORDER BY POST_ID DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_BOARD (TITLE, CONTENTS, REG_ID, REG_DATE, COMMUNITY_ID, HIDDEN_INFO, HIT_COUNT, IS_NOTICE) VALUES ( #{title}, #{contents}, #{regId}, COALESCE(#{regDate}, CURRENT_DATE), #{communityId}, #{hiddenInfo}, COALESCE(#{hitCount}, 0), COALESCE(#{isNotice}, FALSE) )
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_BOARD SET TITLE = #{title}, CONTENTS = #{contents}, COMMUNITY_ID = #{communityId}, HIDDEN_INFO = #{hiddenInfo}, HIT_COUNT = COALESCE(#{hitCount}, 0), IS_NOTICE = COALESCE(#{isNotice}, FALSE) WHERE POST_ID = #{postId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_BOARD (TITLE, CONTENTS, REG_ID, REG_DATE, COMMUNITY_ID, HIDDEN_INFO, HIT_COUNT, IS_NOTICE) VALUES ( #{title}, #{contents}, #{regId}, COALESCE(#{regDate}, CURRENT_DATE), #{communityId}, #{hiddenInfo}, COALESCE(#{hitCount}, 0), COALESCE(#{isNotice}, FALSE) )
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_BOARD SET TITLE = #{title}, CONTENTS = #{contents}, COMMUNITY_ID = #{communityId}, HIDDEN_INFO = #{hiddenInfo}, HIT_COUNT = COALESCE(#{hitCount}, 0), IS_NOTICE = COALESCE(#{isNotice}, FALSE) WHERE POST_ID = #{postId}
